name: Salsa and Three Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 15 oz can Black beans, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine all dressing ingredients; blend well.
2. In a large bowl, combine all salad ingredients.
3. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss to coat.
4. Cover and refrigerate several hours to allow flavors to blend.
